'''''Destiny''''' was an oddly shaped [[Starship/Legends|starship]] attached to [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|''Zirtran's Anchor'']], a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] located in the [[Phosphura Belt Nebula/Legends|Phosphura Belt Nebula]].

It famously provided the home for the mysterious alien [[Species/Legends|species]] called the [[Kalai]], who rarely, if ever, left the ship, and their half-[[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Hybrid/Legends|hybrid]] offspring, the [[Lethagoe]]s. The ship was named using their [[Kalai language|language]], but most people used the closest approximation in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], "Destiny."

Smaller ships were housed inside the ''Destiny''—nimble hawk-shaped vessels which had demonstrated an agility beyond that of other [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] like the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] or the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]].

The ''Destiny''{{'s}} inhabitants connected it to [[Sector Epsilon]] of ''Zirtran's Archor'' during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial period]] and remained annexed since then, even during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].
